page.title: System Administration
page.description: Manage users, roles, and system configuration

form.name: Name
form.emailDescription: Must match user's Azure AD account
form.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 chars, with upper/lowercase & number
form.passwordCreateDescription: Local accounts only. Leave blank for Azure AD / SSO users.
form.rolesDescription: Select user role permissions (at least one required)
form.cityDescription: If assigning City Manager role, specifying a city is recommended

dialog.createDescription: Create new user account. User will be able to login using Azure AD.
dialog.editDescription: Modify user information, roles and city assignment.
dialog.editEmailDescription: Email cannot be modified (bound to Azure AD account)
dialog.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete user "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialog.resetPasswordMessage: Are you sure you want to reset the password for user "{name}"?
dialog.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for this local account. Azure AD accounts are managed by your organization.
dialog.disableMessage: Are you sure you want to disable {name}'s account? After disabling, the user will not be able to login. You can re-enable this account at any time.

list.loadError: Failed to load user list, please try again.

statusToggle.cannotDisableSelf: You cannot disable your own account

dialog.title: Confirm Disable Account
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to disable {name}'s account?
dialog.warning: After disabling, the user will not be able to login. You can re-enable this account at any time.

disabled.title: User Disabled
disabled.description: {name}'s account has been disabled, the user will not be able to login.

enabled.title: User Enabled
enabled.description: {name}'s account has been re-enabled, the user can now login.

created.title: User Created
created.description: {name} has been successfully added to the system

disabled.title: User Disabled
disabled.description: {name}'s account has been disabled, the user will not be able to login.

enabled.title: User Enabled
enabled.description: {name}'s account has been re-enabled, the user can now login.

form.name: Role Name
form.nameDescription: Role name must be unique, supports both English and Chinese
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this role's responsibilities...
form.permissionsDescription: Select operations this role can perform

list.loadError: Failed to load role list, please try again.

custom.label: Custom Roles
custom.empty: No custom roles. Click "Add Role" to create the first custom role

dialog.viewDescription: System roles cannot be modified, view only.
dialog.editDescription: Modify role information and permission settings.

systemRole.title: System Role
systemRole.description: This is a system default role and cannot be modified or deleted. To customize permissions, please create a new custom role.

cannotDelete.title: Cannot Delete
cannotDelete.inUse: Role "{name}" currently has {count} users, please remove users before deleting

add.title: Add Role
add.description: Create custom roles and set permissions. System roles cannot be created this way.

form.name: Role Name
form.nameDescription: Role name must be unique, supports both English and Chinese
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this role's responsibilities...
form.permissionsDescription: Select operations this role can perform (at least one required)

delete.title: Confirm Delete Role
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete role "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

systemRoleAlert.title: System Role
systemRoleAlert.description: This is a system default role and cannot be deleted.

inUseAlert.title: Role In Use
inUseAlert.description: This role currently has {count} users using it. Please assign these users to other roles before deleting.

warningAlert.description: After deletion, all settings for this role will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.

invoice.label: Invoice Operations
invoice.description: Permissions to view, create, review, and approve invoices

report.label: Report Operations
report.description: Permissions to view and export statistical reports

rule.label: Rule Management
rule.description: Permissions to view, manage, and approve mapping rules

forwarder.label: Forwarder Management
forwarder.description: Permissions to view and manage forwarders

user.label: User Management
user.description: Permissions to view and manage user accounts

system.label: System Administration
system.description: Permissions for system configuration and monitoring

audit.label: Audit Operations
audit.description: Permissions to view and export audit records

admin.label: Admin Operations
admin.description: Permissions to view and operate admin-only features

invoice_view.name: View Invoice
invoice_view.description: View invoice list and detailed content

invoice_create.name: Create Invoice
invoice_create.description: Upload and create new invoice records

invoice_approve.name: Approve Invoice
invoice_approve.description: Give final approval to invoice classification results

report_export.name: Export Report
report_export.description: Export report data to Excel/CSV format

rule_view.name: View Rule
rule_view.description: View mapping rules and classification settings

rule_manage.name: Manage Rule
rule_manage.description: Add, edit, and delete mapping rules

user_view.name: View User
user_view.description: View user list and basic information

user_manage.name: Manage Users (Global)
user_manage.description: Manage roles and status of all users in the system

system_config.name: System Configuration
system_config.description: Modify system configuration and global parameters

system_monitor.name: System Monitoring
system_monitor.description: View system operational status and performance metrics

audit_export.name: Export Audit
audit_export.description: Export audit records for compliance purposes

admin_view.name: View Admin Resources
admin_view.description: View historical data batches and admin features

admin_manage.name: Manage Admin Resources
admin_manage.description: Perform batch control and admin operations

cityManager.description: You can only view and manage users in your assigned cities. Contact system administrator for access to other cities.

logs.title: System Logs
logs.description: View system events and error logs

cancelDialog.title: Confirm Cancel Backup
cancelDialog.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this running backup? This action cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.title: Confirm Delete Backup
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? After deletion, it cannot be recovered and the backup file will be permanently removed.

create.title: Create Manual Backup
create.description: Select backup source and type to execute backup operation
create.name: Backup Name

database.label: Database
database.description: Backup all database tables and data

full.label: Full Backup
full.description: Backup all data (recommended for first backup)

incremental.label: Incremental Backup
incremental.description: Only backup data changed since last backup

differential.label: Differential Backup
differential.description: Backup data changed since last full backup

storage.title: Storage Usage
storage.criticalAlert: Storage space is running out! Please clean up old backups or add more storage.
storage.warningAlert: Storage usage exceeds 80%, recommend cleaning up unnecessary backups.

runDialog.title: Confirm Run Schedule
runDialog.description: Are you sure you want to run this backup schedule now? This will start a new backup task.

deleteDialog.title: Confirm Delete Schedule
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this backup schedule? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Schedule Name
form.cronTooltip: Cron expression format: minute hour day month weekday
form.cronExample: e.g., 0 3 * * * means every day at 3 AM
form.enableDescription: When enabled, backup will run automatically

alerts.title: Alert Settings
alerts.description: Configure system alert rules and manage alert notifications

rulesCard.title: Alert Rules
rulesCard.description: Configure monitoring metrics and trigger conditions, system will send notifications automatically

historyCard.title: Alert History
historyCard.description: View all alert records, acknowledge or resolve alerts

rules.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this alert rule? This action cannot be undone.
rules.emptyHint: Click the button above to create a new rule

history.resolvePlaceholder: Describe how this alert was resolved...

createDialog.title: Create Alert Rule
createDialog.description: Configure a new alert rule to monitor system metrics.
createDialog.name: Rule Name *
createDialog.namePlaceholder: e.g. API error rate too high
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: describe the purpose of this rule
createDialog.durationDescription: How long the condition must persist before triggering an alert

apiKeys.title: API Key Management
apiKeys.description: Manage external system API access keys

deleteDialog.title: Delete this API Key?
deleteDialog.description: After deletion, all external systems using this key will not be able to access the API. This action cannot be undone.

rotateDialog.title: Rotate this API Key?
rotateDialog.description: Rotation will generate a new API Key and disable the old one. Systems using the old key need to update to the new key.
rotateDialog.successDescription: Please copy and securely save this new key immediately. It cannot be viewed again after closing.

table.name: Name
table.emptyHint: Create your first API Key to start using external APIs

createDialog.successDescription: Please copy and securely save this key immediately. It cannot be viewed again after closing.
createDialog.importantDescription: This is the only time you will see the complete API Key. Please make sure it is securely saved.
createDialog.title: Create API Key
createDialog.description: Create a new API Key for external systems to access the API.
createDialog.name: Name *
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: describe the purpose of this key
createDialog.allowedIpsPlaceholder: Optional: separate multiple IPs with commas
createDialog.allowedIpsDescription: Leave blank to allow all IPs. e.g. 192.168.1.1, 10.0.0.1

configManagement.title: System Configuration
configManagement.empty: No configuration items in this category

toast.updatedRequiresRestart: Configuration updated, requires service restart to take effect

resetDialog.title: Confirm Reset Configuration
resetDialog.description: Are you sure you want to reset this configuration to default? This action will be recorded in the change history.

logsViewer.title: System Logs
logsViewer.description: Query and analyze system operation logs

filters.title: Filter Conditions
filters.description: Filter logs by level, source, and keywords

export.title: Export Logs
export.description: Select an export format and time range, and the system will generate a downloadable file

formats.csvDescription: Suitable for Excel or spreadsheet applications
formats.jsonDescription: Suitable for programmatic processing and data analysis

statusDescriptions.PENDING: Restore job created, waiting to run
statusDescriptions.VALIDATING: Verifying the integrity of the backup file
statusDescriptions.PRE_BACKUP: Creating a safety backup before restoring
statusDescriptions.ROLLED_BACK: Rolled back to the original state after restore failure

typeDescriptions.FULL: Completely replace all existing data, restoring to the full state at backup time
typeDescriptions.PARTIAL: Restore only selected tables or files, preserving other existing data
typeDescriptions.DRILL: Test the restore process in an isolated environment without affecting production data
typeDescriptions.POINT_IN_TIME: Restore to a specified point-in-time state

scopeDescriptions.DATABASE: Restore all tables and records in the database
scopeDescriptions.ALL: Restore all data, including database, files, and settings

cancelDialog.title: Confirm cancel restore operation?
cancelDialog.description: This will cancel the restore task that is waiting to run. Completed steps will not be affected.

steps.configDescription: Set the restore type and scope

step0.intro: Select the backup to restore from. Only completed backups are available.
step0.emptyDescription: There are no completed backups available for restore. Please create a backup first.

step1.drillNameHint: Name this drill for easier identification later

step2.errorDescription: Please confirm the backup status is normal and try again.

step3.warningTitle: ⚠️ Warning: This is a destructive operation
step3.drillWarning: The restore drill runs in an isolated environment and will not affect production data.
step3.fullWarning: This operation will overwrite existing data. The system automatically creates a pre-restore backup, but you should still confirm you understand the impact.

detailDialog.title: Restore Operation Details
detailDialog.description: View the details and progress of the restore operation

cancelDialog.title: Confirm cancel restore operation?
cancelDialog.description: This will cancel the restore task that is waiting to run. If the restore has already started, it may not be fully cancelled.

rollbackDialog.title: Confirm rollback restore operation?
rollbackDialog.description: This will use the pre-restore backup to roll the system back to the state before the restore operation. This is a destructive operation, please confirm carefully.
